---
title: "Kaggle challenge : Dreem"
description: "Deep learning for sleep stage scoring on EEG signals"
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://pablo-mas.github.io/
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Master student at BME Paris (Bioengineering and Innovation in Neuroscience track)
date: 11-17-2021
categories: [Python, Courses, Kaggle] # self-defined categories
image: eeg.png
draft: true # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
